THETREASURER-MONEY_POWER.title: Money = Power
THETREASURER-MONEY_POWER.description: Gain [E] at the start of your turn if *Gold > 100.

THETREASURER-COMPOUND_INTEREST_POWER.sma: At end of turn, gain {Amount}% of your current *Gold ({GainNow}/100 max).
THETREASURER-ARCANE_FLOW_POWER.title: Arcane Flow
THETREASURER-ARCANE_FLOW_POWER.descripti: The first enchanted card you play each turn costs 0.
THETREASURER-ARCANE_FLOW_POWER.smartDesc: The first enchanted card you play each turn costs 0.

THETREASURER-ARCANE_FLOW_PLUS_POWER.smar: The first enchanted card you play each turn costs 0 and draws 1.

THETREASURER-TEMP_STRENGTH_DOWN_POWER.sm: This creature's Strength is temporarily reduced this turn.
THETREASURER-CHARM_FORM_POWER.title: Charm Form
THETREASURER-CHARM_FORM_POWER.descriptio: When you draw a card, apply a random enchantment to it this combat.
THETREASURER-CHARM_FORM_POWER.smartDescr: When you draw a card, apply a random enchantment to it this combat.
THETREASURER-GAMBLING_ADDICTION_POWER.de: Lose 5-10 Gold each turn. Gain [E] and draw {Amount}. If you lose all Gold, you die.
THETREASURER-GAMBLING_ADDICTION_POWER.sm: Lose 5-10 Gold each turn. Gain [E] and draw {Amount}. If you lose all Gold, you die.
THETREASURER-GETAWAY_POWER.title: Getaway
THETREASURER-GETAWAY_POWER.description: When you play a Power, enchant a random card in your hand with Swift 2.
THETREASURER-GETAWAY_POWER.smartDescript: When you play a Power, enchant a random card in your hand with Swift 2.
THETREASURER-KINTSUGI_POWER.title: Kintsugi
THETREASURER-KINTSUGI_POWER.description: When a Resin Relic is destroyed this turn, gain 5 Gold and apply {Amount} random enchantment(s) to your hand at end of turn.
THETREASURER-KINTSUGI_POWER.smartDescrip: When a Resin Relic is destroyed this turn, gain 5 Gold and apply {Amount} random enchantment(s) to your hand at end of turn.

THETREASURER-LIFE_INSURANCE_POWER.descri: If you die, revive with 1 HP and lose {Amount} Gold. One time.
THETREASURER-LIFE_INSURANCE_POWER.smartD: If you die, revive with 1 HP and lose {Amount} Gold. One time.
THETREASURER-MASTERMIND_POWER.title: Mastermind
THETREASURER-MASTERMIND_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you create a Resin Relic this combat, gain {Amount} Strength.
THETREASURER-MASTERMIND_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever you create a Resin Relic this combat, gain {Amount} Strength.

THETREASURER-REPLICA_POWER.description: The first Resin Relic you create each turn is duplicated.
THETREASURER-REPLICA_POWER.smartDescript: The first Resin Relic you create each turn is duplicated.
THETREASURER-RESIN_SHIELD_POWER.title: Resin Shield
THETREASURER-RESIN_SHIELD_POWER.descript: When a Resin Relic is destroyed this turn, gain {Amount} Dexterity at end of turn.
THETREASURER-RESIN_SHIELD_POWER.smartDes: When a Resin Relic is destroyed this turn, gain {Amount} Dexterity at end of turn.

THETREASURER-REROLL_POWER.smartDescripti: At the start of your turn, enchant a high cost card in your hand with Slither.
